title: What cars would the Eva cast drive
display_title: What cars would the Eva cast drive
wikitext:
[]: What cars would the Eva cast drive?             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Jun 02, 2015 3:44 pm We all know Misato has her Renault Alpine, but none of the other characters are ever seen with their own cars (probably because most of them are 14). So assuming all the characters are old enough to drive, what cars do you think they'd have? Here's my thoughts... Asuka: A big flashy BMW (red of course) stuffed with gadgets and a souped up engine. Rei: Something exceedingly dull and functional, most likely a Honda Civic. Shinji: Knowing his luck he'd probably end up with a dodgy cut 'n' shut job, or if he was really unlucky a Reliant Robin. Or a cut 'n' shut Reliant Robin. Hikari: A litttle green VW Beetle most likely. Touji/Kensuke: Would probably build their own cars (with predictably hilarious results). Ritsuko: Something classy, maybe a Jaguar. Maya: A pink Nissan Micra. Never goes over 40 MPH. Hyuga/Aoba: The most generic company cars in existance. Gendo: A black Rolls Royce. Except when nobody is looking, when he rides a scooter. Fuyutsuki: A clunky old Peugeot, covered in dents and with a custom reg reading "F0XY GR4NDP4" or "K0Z0M4N".

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Jun 02, 2015 4:41 pm Shinji: Honda Civic Rei: Toyota Prius Asuka: Porsche Boxster convertible Toji: Subaru WRX Kensuke: A military Jeep Hikari: Nissan Micra Hyuga: Nissan GT-R Aoba: An old VW beetle, restored Maya: Nissan Leaf Ritsuko: BMW M5

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jun 02, 2015 4:51 pm Mari would drive Asuka in car form, Utena style.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Tue Jun 02, 2015 7:19 pm Asuka: Red BMW Z-series Shinji: Dodge Neon Rei: '80s Minivan (20 mph under the speed limit at all times). Kensuke: Halftrack Touji: Cadillac Escalade Fuyutsuki: '50s Cadillac Gendo: Black Hummer H2 with no mirrors and a 'Get off the fucking road!' bumper sticker. Ritsuko: DeLorean Mari: Dodge Viper Kaworu: Maserati

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Jun 02, 2015 8:27 pm Ford Pintos. All of them.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 02, 2015 11:36 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Mari would drive Asuka in car form, Utena style.

[]:             Quote Post by suppadoopa » Wed Jun 03, 2015 1:46 am Shinji would drive a Daihatsu

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Wed Jun 03, 2015 5:32 pm Mari: Gaudy pink hummer covered in chrome with dildos in the seats. Rei: Nissan Murano Shinji: Any 70s muscle car. He has to compensate, somehow. Asuka: A Stug. It Stugs. Kensuke and Touji: A helicopter. With .50 cal machine guns. Misato: Masda Cosmo Maya: Volkswagen Beetle with carlashes Hyuga: SMART Car Aoba: Band tour bus Hikari: Mini Cooper Ritsuko: DeLorean Fuyutsuki: Bentley Continental Gendou: Pimpmobile Kaji: G Wiz Kaworu: Ford Pinto

[]:             Quote Post by Ari » Thu Jun 04, 2015 9:39 pm To be honest, I see Maya as more of a smartcar kind of person.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Jun 04, 2015 9:56 pm ^^ I think it was established in some primary or secondary continuity that Kaji drives an old 1960's Mazda Cosmo convertible.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Jun 04, 2015 10:29 pm Not to rain on anybody's parade, but Gendo doesn't drive. He gets driven by stoic men wearing white gloves who are hella good at pulling U-turns. Actually, speaking of not driving, I don't think a lot of characters actually drive. Remember in Episode 11 when we see the characters doing coin laundry and taking the subway? Hell, even Fuyu's on the subway. When Hyuga commandeers that political van, he doesn't drive it; he just keeps the regular guy in the driver's seat and tells him where to go-- not that this means that Hyuga doesn't know how to drive, but it might point somewhere in that direction.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Thu Jun 04, 2015 10:36 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Actually, speaking of not driving, I don't think a lot of characters actually drive. Remember in Episode 11 when we see the characters doing coin laundry and taking the subway? Hell, even Fuyu's on the subway. When Hyuga commandeers that political van, he doesn't drive it; he just keeps the regular guy in the driver's seat and tells him where to go-- not that this means that Hyuga doesn't know how to drive, but it might point somewhere in that direction.

[]:             Quote Post by Shoujo Kakumei Asuka » Thu Jun 04, 2015 11:07 pm Catamari wrote: Shinji: Any 70s muscle car. He has to compensate, somehow.
